svg.title: Nuke t default sourced-map overlay
svg.desc: Nuke t default teaching overlay. Outside pressure and a Ramp/Secret threat force upper and lower defenders to respect different floors before the hit. Five players: Outside pressure: T Spawn → Yard; Secret threat: Yard → Secret / lower; Lobby player: Lobby → Hut / Squeaky; Ramp threat: Ramp → lower; Bomb / flex: join upper or lower read. The sourced overview remains the map layer; annotations are editorial and not pixel-perfect.
svg.text: Outside pressure and a Ramp/Secret threat force upper and lower defenders to respect different floors before the hit.

g.text: Sourced overview: https://www.csgold.net/en/maps/nuke · local annotations are a teaching overlay, not a replacement radar.
